name: material-evidence-consistency-guard
description: Checks consistency signals across product attributes, notices, detail-page claims, and test-report evidence before human review; it does not make legal judgments, certify authenticity, or automate approval.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-review consistency checks for product evidence.
interface.longDescription: Helps prepare human review by validating inputs, normalizing explicit material evidence, running R-001 through R-006 consistency checks, and writing JSON and Markdown review outputs. It does not make legal determinations, approve or block sales, judge certificate authenticity, or decide whether advertising is false.
